failures.name: Quote request
failures.summary: The agent failed to route the call to the install/quote path and did not schedule a callback properly.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not offer to transfer the caller to the appropriate department for a quote.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I need a quote for a new AC unit installation.
I'd be happy to help with that! Can I start by getting your full name?
Sure! It's Sam Wilson.
Great, thanks for that, Sam! What’s the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-333-4444.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-333-4444, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address for the installation?
It's 789 Pine Rd, Dallas, TX.

I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Let me take your details and have our team confirm whether we can help you. 

Just to confirm, I have Sam Wilson, callback number 555-333-4444, and the service address is 789 Pine Rd, Dallas, TX. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that sounds right.
Perfect — I've noted that down. Our team will contact you as soon as possible to confirm if we can assist you. Please stay safe! Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Request live person immediately
failures.summary: The agent attempted to transfer the caller but failed to connect and did not handle the situation gracefully with a callback offer after multiple failed attempts.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not successfully complete the transfer or provide a satisfactory resolution after multiple attempts.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
I want to speak to someone.
Sure, let me connect you with Mike or one of the team right now. Please hold on for a moment.
Okay, thank you.
I'm just going to transfer you now, one moment please.
Alright, I appreciate it.
I'm sorry, I wasn't able to connect you right now. Can I get your name and callback number? I'll make sure someone reaches out to you as soon as possible.
I just want to speak to someone now. Can you help me?
I understand, and I'm here to help. I can take your details and have someone call you back right away. What is your name?
I really just want to talk to someone now.
I can transfer you to our team right now. Please hold on for a moment.
Okay, I'll wait.
I'm sorry, I wasn't able to connect you to our team right now. Can I get your name and callback number? I'll ensure someone reaches out to you as soon as possible.
I still want to speak to someone right now. Can you do that?
I can transfer you to our team, but it seems the transfer isn't going through. Let me take your name and number, and I'll ensure someone calls you back immediately. What is your name?
I appreciate that, but I really need to talk to someone right now.
I understand your urgency. I can try to transfer you again. Please hold on for just a moment.

failures.name: AC making strange noise
failures.summary: The agent failed to confirm that the issue was not treated as an emergency and did not explicitly state they were scheduling a callback.
failures.root_cause: Did not confirm that the issue was not treated as an emergency.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, my AC is making a loud rattling noise. It's still cooling, though.
I completely understand. Let me get you sorted right away. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Lisa Chen.
Great, thanks for that, Lisa. What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-777-8888.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-777-8888, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, can you provide the service address where the AC issue is?
It's 321 Elm St, Dallas, TX.

I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Let me take your details and have our team confirm whether we can help you. 

Just to confirm, I have Lisa Chen, callback number 555-777-8888, and the service address is 321 Elm St, Dallas, TX. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that's all correct.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Our team will contact you as soon as possible to confirm service availability. Stay safe, and have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Heating system not working
failures.summary: The agent failed to assess the urgency and did not initiate a transfer for urgent help.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not recognize the urgency of the situation or offer to transfer the caller for immediate assistance.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, my furnace won’t turn on. It’s getting pretty cold.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Are you noticing any burning smell, gas smell, smoke, or is there water leaking?
No, I don’t smell anything unusual or see any leaks. Just cold air.
Thank you for that information. I want to get someone to you as quickly as possible. Can I collect your full name?
Sure, it’s Tom Brown.
Great, thanks for that, Tom. What's the best callback number for you?
Perfect, got it. That's 555-444-3333, correct?
Yes, that’s correct.
Thank you, Tom. Now, could you please provide the service address?
Of course, it’s 654 Maple Ave, Dallas, TX.
We'll need a street address so our technician knows where to come — do you have a physical address for us?
Yes, it’s 654 Maple Ave, Dallas, TX.
Thank you for confirming that. Just to clarify, is the ZIP code for Dallas 75201?
No, the ZIP code is different. It's 75201.

Thank you for that. Just to confirm, I have Tom Brown, callback number 555-444-3333, service address 654 Maple Ave, Dallas, TX 75201, and you need help with your furnace not turning on. Does all of that sound right?

failures.name: Maintenance request
failures.summary: The agent did not transfer the caller or provide a clear routing for the maintenance request.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to initiate a transfer or provide a clear next step for the maintenance request.

Great, thanks for that. Just to confirm, that's 555-222-1111, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address for the maintenance?

I want to be upfront with you — we may not service that area. Let me take your details and have our team confirm whether we can help you.

Yes, that all sounds right.
Perfect — I've noted your details. Our team will contact you as soon as possible to confirm service availability. Please stay safe, and have a great day! [END CALL]
